summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions CPQ Platform iteration 6. All new features verified working: Custom pointer drag (mousedown on product icon → drag → mouseup on canvas), 'Icoon | 2D' toggle visible in toolbar, 2D mode shows scaled rectangles with real dimensions (CANVAS_SCALE=10px/m), Icon mode shows 48x48 rounded icons, product cards show dimensions (3x6m, 6x8m, 8x12m), drag ghost preview follows cursor during pointer drag, AI Layout generates rectangular pitches with road loop, right sidebar shows 'Investering' and '60 mnd incl. SLA', Step 5 shows 'Aankoopkosten' and 'Operational Lease' with visible lease explanation text.
passed_tests: Pointer drag: mousedown on product icon drag handle, drag to canvas, mouseup - product is placed
Click-to-place: click product card shows 'Klik op het canvas om te plaatsen', then click canvas - product is placed
2D view toggle: 'Icoon | 2D' toggle visible in canvas toolbar (data-testid='view-mode-toggle')
2D mode: products shown as colored rectangles with real dimensions (e.g., 30x60px for 3x6m sanitair)
Icon mode: products shown as 48x48 rounded icon squares (w-12 h-12 class)
Product cards show dimensions: 3x6m, 6x8m, 8x12m badges next to price for large products
Drag ghost: floating preview follows cursor during pointer drag (fixed position z-50)
AI Layout generates rectangular pitches (8x10m normal, 12x15m XL) with road loop (4 road zones)
Right sidebar shows '60 mnd incl. SLA' as visible text
Step 5 shows 'Uitgaande van 60 maanden incl. SLA onderhoudscontract' as visible text
22 drag handles found on product cards (data-testid='drag-handle-{id}')
7 dimension badges found on product cards
Sanitair Samenstellen section visible with Adyen payment and 4 checkbox options

success_rate.backend: 100% (API working, products returned with correct dimensions)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working. Key features tested: 1) Custom pointer drag - mousedown on drag handle (data-testid='drag-handle-{id}'), move mouse to canvas, mouseup places product. Ghost preview follows cursor during drag. 2) Click-to-place still works - click product card to select (shows green highlight with 'Klik op het canvas om te plaatsen'), then click canvas to place. 3) 'Icoon | 2D' toggle visible in toolbar (data-testid='view-mode-toggle') with two buttons. Default is '2d' mode. 4) 2D mode shows products as scaled rectangles using CANVAS_SCALE=10px/m (e.g., 3x6m sanitair = 30x60px). 5) Icon mode shows products as 48x48 rounded icons. 6) Product cards show dimension badges (3x6m, 6x8m, 8x12m) for large products. 7) Sanitair products show 'vanaf' price prefix. 8) AI Layout generates rectangular pitches with road loop. 9) Right sidebar shows 'Investering' and '60 mnd incl. SLA'. 10) Step 5 shows 'Aankoopkosten', 'Operational Lease', and '60 maanden incl. SLA onderhoudscontract' text.
